---
name: Component Request
about: Request a new component for the library
title: "[COMPONENT] "
labels: component-request, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Component Name

<!-- What would this component be called? e.g. "DateRangePicker", "Kanban Board", "Radial Menu" -->

## Description

<!-- Describe the component and what it does -->

## Use Case

<!-- Why do you need this component? What problem does it solve? -->

## Design Reference

<!-- Optional: screenshots, links, or ASCII mockups showing what it should look like -->

## Category

<!-- Which section does this belong to? -->
- [ ] Core Components (forms, inputs, display)
- [ ] Data Display (charts, tables, lists)
- [ ] Feedback & States (alerts, modals, loading)
- [ ] Interactive (drag & drop, gestures, shortcuts)
- [ ] Overlay & Utility (dropdowns, modals, tooltips)
- [ ] Animation
- [ ] Signature / HUD (Endfield-exclusive)

## Priority

<!-- How important is this for your project? -->
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Important
- [ ] Blocking my project

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other information, related components, or implementation notes -->
